response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack expertise, and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq — aligning well with the role’s agentic code review and high-throughput system demands. His operational ownership, open-source leadership, and agile practices (CI/CD, TDD) meet non-technical requirements. Minor concerns include limited explicit Python mastery and no confirmed on-call incident response history.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic code generation at re:cinq
Deep distributed systems background with high-throughput, low-latency systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational and DevOps ownership (CI/CD, Kubernetes, GitLab, monitoring)
concerns: Python expertise not explicitly detailed despite being a must-have
No clear evidence of formal on-call incident response or SRE practices
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting stakeholder alignment in Berlin-based team
